## PostMessageEndpoint interface

Standard PostMessage-based communication interface compatible with:

- Web Workers (Worker, SharedWorker) - Message Ports (MessagePort) - Broadcast Channels (BroadcastChannel) - Service Workers (ServiceWorkerGlobalScope) - Windows (Window)

T - The message data type (defaults to any)

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface PostMessageEndpoint<T = any> 
```

## Example


```typescript
const worker = new Worker('worker.js')
// Worker already implements PostMessageEndpoint
worker.postMessage('Hello')
worker.addEventListener('message', (e) => console.log(e.data))
```
